prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response:
# Waking Up: A Daily Reboot with Questionable User Experience (2.5/5)

The much-hyped "Waking Up" experience fails to deliver on its promise of refreshment, instead offering an inconsistent product that varies wildly from day to day. While occasionally providing moments of peaceful transition and clarity, more often it arrives with an unwelcome jarring sensation and a persistent grogginess that the manufacturer has yet to address despite countless customer complaints. The interface is needlessly complicated—requiring multiple attempts at the "snooze" function—and the accompanying "morning breath" feature seems entirely unnecessary. Though the "new day possibilities" aspect shows potential, the execution remains fundamentally flawed, especially in its standard weekday model. Would not recommend at full price; perhaps wait for the weekend version which reportedly offers improved performance.
